violations.text: Salad was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed salad container in ice bath for service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Various cooked items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2026

Inspector observed dead rodent in basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed from premises. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (a small accumulation of droppings in basement). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to continue with pcs services 1x monthly. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (dumpster) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The floor and wall junctures in basement area is in poor repair. Observed holes and gaps. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, construction of basement area is scheduled take place 9/8/2024. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout the basement area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The ceiling in the basement food storage area is in poor repair(exposed insulation and pipes). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The basement storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
